steps.title: Solve the unknown directly
steps.content: The function is already in the form $f(x)=rx+s$. Use the two table points $(-8,48)$ and $(8,-96)$ to find the slope and intercept.

steps.title: Answer rs
steps.content: Now multiply: $$rs=(-9)(-24)=216$$ The correct free-response answer is 216.
